fields.prodConfig: AKS 3-node pool with autoscale; PTU-reserved Azure OpenAI; alerts on latency p99, FPR drift, and event-lag; cost cap alarms.
fields.rollback: Feature flag disables scoring instantly (claims flow unaffected). Auto-rollback if error rate > 2% or event lag > 60 s for 5 min.
fields.hypercare: 2-week hypercare: partner ML engineer + claims IT on-call 06-22 CET; daily triage; escalation to vendor for ClaimCenter add-on issues.

rows.signal: Error rate < 0.5%; no SIU queue overflow, 2 weeks
Latency and FPR stable at higher volume
